engineIntelligence.h2: Cadillac Lyriq Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the electric drive units and battery systems fitted to the Cadillac Lyriq in the UK - including known failure causes, variant production years, typical replacement costs, and key technical specs. Tone: honest, informative, data-led. Do not say "in stock". Do not say "available now". Do not make absolute price claims - use "typical UK market ranges".

cards.altText: Cadillac Lyriq PMSM-FR drive unit - electric 340hp replacement UK
knownFailures: Inverter module failure - DTC P0A78 triggers reduced propulsion mode, typically 40k-70k miles.
Phase current sensor fault - causes intermittent power loss and requires drive unit diagnostics.
cards.specs: Electric · AC Permanent Magnet · 340hp (255kW) · Single Motor RWD
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt drive unit: £3,500-£6,200 (supply only) Estimated from comparable Ultium platform units - actual quotes may vary.

cards.altText: Cadillac Lyriq NCMA-102 battery pack - electric 102kWh replacement UK
productionHistory: All Lyriq variants (Luxury, Sport, Debut Edition) - 2023-2026
knownFailures: High voltage connection weld issue - recall 2023563 affects early 2023-2024 builds, may cause charging disabled warnings.
Battery module imbalance - individual cell degradation triggers BMS faults after 60k+ miles.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt battery pack: £8,500-£18,500 (supply only) Estimated from comparable Ultium battery units - actual quotes may vary significantly.

cards.altText: Cadillac Lyriq INV-P0A78 inverter module - electric drive control replacement UK
productionHistory: All Lyriq drive units (RWD and AWD configurations) - 2023-2026
knownFailures: IGBT overcurrent failure - causes DTC P0A78, reduced power mode, and potential drive unit shutdown.
Thermal management fault - inverter overheating triggers protective limp mode on high-load driving.
cards.specs: Electric Control · Inverter Module · P0A78 Fault Code · Ultium Platform
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt inverter module: £1,800-£4,200 (supply only)

commonProblems.h2: Cadillac Lyriq Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Cadillac Lyriq's Ultium electric powertrain is generally reliable, but drive unit inverter faults (P0A78), high-voltage battery connection issues, and reduced propulsion warnings dominate UK replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt drive unit or battery pack supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use the problem groups below as a decision tool to compare repair versus replacement costs.

problems.h4: Lyriq Reduced Propulsion Power Warning - Why Drive Units Enter Limp Mode
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac Lyriq Luxury RWD, Luxury AWD, Sport AWD (2023-2026, PMSM-FR/RR drive units)
problems.rootCause: Drive motor inverter module detects overcurrent or phase imbalance (DTC P0A78), triggering protective reduced power mode to prevent catastrophic motor damage.

repairOptions.tier: Diagnostic & Software Reset - Clear fault codes and recalibrate inverter
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: OBD2 diagnostics, inverter software update, test drive verification
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix only if hardware is sound; fault often returns within weeks

repairOptions.tier: Inverter Module Replacement - Replace faulty PIM without full drive unit swap
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove drive unit, replace inverter module, recalibrate motor control system
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses root cause for P0A78 faults; 12-month warranty on rebuilt module

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Drive Unit - Supply & fit complete remanufactured unit
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove failed drive unit, install rebuilt PMSM unit with upgraded inverter, full calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Most reliable long-term solution; upgraded components address known failure points

problems.recommendation: If your Lyriq shows reduced propulsion warnings with DTC P0A78, get a specialist diagnostic first. For early-mileage faults under warranty, pursue Cadillac claim. For out-of-warranty units above 50k miles, a rebuilt drive unit with upgraded inverter offers better long-term value than repeated module swaps.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt PMSM drive unit prices for your Cadillac Lyriq

problems.group: Lyriq High Voltage Battery Connection Fault
problems.h4: Lyriq High Voltage Battery Connection Fault - Recall & Replacement Triggers
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac Lyriq all variants with NCMA-102 battery pack (early 2023-2024 builds)
problems.rootCause: High-voltage busbar weld defects (recall 2023563) or individual battery module imbalance causing BMS faults and charging disabled warnings.

repairOptions.tier: Recall Repair - Weld Inspection - Dealer-performed recall fix
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: High-voltage system inspection, busbar weld reinforcement if affected VIN
repairOptions.longevity: Only applicable to recalled VINs; does not address module degradation

repairOptions.tier: Module-Level Repair - Replace faulty battery modules only
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove battery pack, diagnose faulty modules, replace 1-3 modules, rebalance BMS
repairOptions.longevity: Cost-effective if only 1-2 modules failed; requires specialist EV battery equipment

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Battery Pack - Supply & fit remanufactured 102kWh pack
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove failed pack, install rebuilt NCMA-102 unit with upgraded cells, full HV calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Most reliable for high-mileage or multi-module failures; includes 12-month warranty

problems.recommendation: First verify if your Lyriq VIN is covered by recall 2023563 - if yes, pursue dealer repair at no cost. For out-of-recall battery issues or degradation above 60k miles, a rebuilt pack with upgraded cells offers better value than repeated module repairs.
problems.cta: Get quotes for NCMA-102 battery pack replacement for your Cadillac Lyriq

problems.group: Lyriq Service High Voltage System Message
problems.h4: Lyriq Service High Voltage System Message - Diagnostic & Replacement Path
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac Lyriq all variants (2023-2026, all Ultium configurations)
problems.rootCause: Multiple potential triggers: inverter fault, battery BMS communication error, high-voltage isolation fault, or charging system malfunction requiring specialist HV diagnostics.

repairOptions.tier: Specialist HV Diagnostic - Full high-voltage system scan
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: HV isolation test, BMS communication check, inverter code readout, fault isolation report
repairOptions.longevity: Essential first step; identifies whether issue is battery, inverter, or wiring

repairOptions.tier: Component Repair - Replace faulty HV component (charger, BMS, wiring)
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace onboard charger, BMS module, or HV wiring harness based on diagnostics
repairOptions.longevity: Cost-effective if fault is isolated to single component; requires EV-certified technician

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt Drive/Battery Unit - Address root cause with remanufactured unit
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace failed drive unit or battery pack with rebuilt unit, full HV system calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for multiple fault codes or high-mileage units; includes upgraded components

problems.recommendation: Never ignore "Service High Voltage System" warnings - pull over safely and arrange specialist diagnostics. For single-component faults under 50k miles, targeted repair may suffice. For multiple codes or units above 60k miles, a rebuilt drive unit or battery pack offers better long-term reliability.
problems.cta: Compare Cadillac Lyriq high voltage system repair quotes

problems.group: Lyriq Electronic Parking Brake Motor Failure
problems.h4: Lyriq Electronic Parking Brake Motor Failure - Adjacent Powertrain Fault
problems.rootCause: EPB actuator motor failure or control module communication fault, often triggered by 12V battery issues or software glitches affecting HV system interlocks.

repairOptions.tier: EPB Reset & Calibration - Software reset and actuator relearn
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: OBD2 EPB reset procedure, actuator calibration, system test
repairOptions.longevity: Effective for software-induced faults; may not resolve mechanical motor failure

repairOptions.tier: Actuator Motor Replacement - Replace faulty EPB motor assembly
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove caliper assembly, replace EPB motor, recalibrate brake system
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses mechanical motor failure; 12-month warranty on rebuilt actuator

repairOptions.tier: Full Caliper Assembly Replacement - Replace complete EPB caliper unit
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace entire electric caliper assembly, bleed brake system, full calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for high-mileage units or repeated actuator failures

problems.recommendation: EPB faults often stem from 12V battery issues - check auxiliary battery first. For confirmed actuator motor failure, a rebuilt EPB motor offers better value than full caliper replacement unless the caliper itself shows wear.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Cadillac Lyriq EPB motor replacement

Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Cadillac Lyriq and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

Module-level repair possible for isolated cell failures, reducing replacement cost
Out-of-warranty battery replacement costs typically £8,500-£18,500 supply-only

engineYears.h2: Cadillac Lyriq Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major powertrain changes across the Cadillac Lyriq's production timeline, organised so owners can quickly identify their drive unit configuration and compare rebuilt replacement prices from UK specialists.

years.preview: Launch Year: RWD Debut & Initial Production
years.description: The inaugural model year introduced the Lyriq with single-motor RWD configuration and first-generation Ultium battery packs.
keyChanges: Cadillac Lyriq launches in UK with Luxury RWD and Debut Edition variants
Single PMSM-RR rear drive unit delivering 340hp (255kW)
102kWh NCMA battery pack with wireless BMS debuts
Initial production builds subject to recall 2023563 for HV weld inspection
mainEngines: PMSM-RR - 340hp electric rear motor (Luxury RWD, Debut Edition)
NCMA-102 - 102kWh high voltage battery pack (all variants)
INV-P0A78 - Power inverter module (all drive units)
knownFor: Launch-year excitement with strong initial reliability reports
Early recall for high-voltage battery weld inspection (2023563)
Inverter module P0A78 faults emerging on higher-mileage launch units
Strong residual values driving replacement part demand
years.cta: Get quotes for 2023 Cadillac Lyriq replacement drive units
years.ticker: Lyriq reduced propulsion warning • P0A78 inverter fault • Battery recall replacement • Luxury RWD drive unit cost

years.description: Model year 2024 expanded the Lyriq range with dual-motor AWD configurations and the performance-oriented Sport trim.
keyChanges: Luxury AWD variant introduced with dual PMSM-FR/RR motors (500hp combined)
Sport AWD trim debuts with tuned 528hp high-output drive units
Inverter module software updates address early P0A78 fault patterns
Production refinements reduce initial battery weld recall exposure
mainEngines: PMSM-FR - Front electric motor for AWD variants (180-220hp contribution)
PMSM-RR - Rear electric motor (340hp RWD / 308hp AWD contribution)
PMSM-FR-HO/RR-HO - High-output motors for Sport AWD (528hp combined)
NCMA-102 - Refined 102kWh battery pack with updated BMS firmware
knownFor: AWD variants show higher replacement demand due to dual-motor complexity
Sport trim owners seek performance-matched rebuilt drive units
Inverter thermal management improvements reduce P0A78 recurrence
Battery pack availability improves as salvage market develops

years.ticker: AWD drive unit compatibility • Sport trim motor replacement • Front motor inverter fault • Dual motor calibration

years.description: Later model years benefit from production refinements, though early units now approach out-of-warranty status driving replacement enquiries.
keyChanges: Continued production of Luxury RWD/AWD and Sport AWD configurations
Software updates improve BMS communication and inverter fault detection
First 2023 model year units approach 8-year battery warranty expiry
Salvage market for Lyriq drive units expands as accident vehicles enter system

NCMA-102 - Battery pack with improved module balancing algorithms

faq.h2: Cadillac Lyriq Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Cadillac Lyriq drive unit in the UK?
items.answer: Rebuilt Cadillac Lyriq drive units typically cost £3,500-£9,500 supply-only, depending on RWD/AWD configuration and whether inverter module replacement is included. Supply & fit adds £850-£2,200 labour.
keyPoints: RWD single-motor units: £3,500-£6,200 rebuilt supply-only
AWD dual-motor systems: £5,200-£9,500 for complete replacement
Inverter module-only repair: £1,800-£4,200 if motor windings are sound
All rebuilt units include 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Cadillac Lyriq drive unit prices for your variant

items.question: Is the Cadillac Lyriq battery pack covered under warranty if it fails?
items.answer: Yes - Cadillac provides an 8-year/100,000-mile warranty on the 102kWh battery pack for defects and capacity loss below 70%, covering most early-failure scenarios.
keyPoints: Warranty covers manufacturing defects, weld issues (recall 2023563), and excessive degradation
Capacity must fall below 70% of original for warranty replacement eligibility
Out-of-warranty rebuilt packs cost £8,500-£18,500 supply-only
Module-level repair may be possible for isolated cell failures
items.cta: Check Cadillac Lyriq battery warranty eligibility for your VIN

items.question: What causes the Cadillac Lyriq reduced propulsion power warning?
items.answer: The "Reduced Propulsion Power" warning typically indicates drive motor inverter fault code P0A78, triggered by overcurrent detection or phase imbalance in the AC permanent magnet motor system.
keyPoints: DTC P0A78 is the most common fault code driving Lyriq replacement enquiries
Faults often occur between 35,000-75,000 miles on early-production units
Software reset may temporarily clear code but hardware replacement is usually required
Rebuilt drive units with upgraded inverter modules address the root cause
items.cta: Get quotes for Cadillac Lyriq P0A78 inverter repair or replacement

items.question: Can a Cadillac Lyriq drive unit be repaired instead of replaced?
items.answer: Yes - inverter module replacement, sensor repairs, or bearing service can fix specific faults without full drive unit replacement, but only if the motor windings and core components are intact.
keyPoints: Inverter module swaps cost £1,800-£4,200 versus £3,500+ for full rebuilt unit
Bearing noise or winding damage requires complete drive unit replacement
Specialist diagnostics essential to determine repair-versus-replace viability
Rebuilt units with upgraded components offer better long-term value for high-mileage vehicles
items.cta: Compare Cadillac Lyriq drive unit repair versus replacement costs

items.question: Where can I buy a replacement Cadillac Lyriq drive unit in the UK?
items.answer: EngineMarket connects you with vetted UK specialists supplying rebuilt, reconditioned and used Cadillac Lyriq drive units, with nationwide delivery and 12-month warranty coverage on all rebuilt units.
keyPoints: Network includes EV-certified rebuilders with Ultium platform experience
All suppliers provide full unit history, testing reports and warranty documentation
Supply-only or complete supply & fit options available depending on your needs
Free quote comparison ensures you find the best value for your specific variant
items.cta: Find trusted UK Cadillac Lyriq drive unit suppliers now

items.question: How long does a Cadillac Lyriq electric drive unit typically last?
items.answer: With proper maintenance, Lyriq drive units are designed for 150,000+ miles, but inverter module faults (P0A78) commonly emerge between 35,000-75,000 miles on early-production units.
keyPoints: Motor windings and bearings typically outlast inverter electronics
Thermal management system health significantly impacts longevity
Regular coolant service and software updates help prevent premature failures
Rebuilt units with upgraded inverters often exceed original equipment lifespan
items.cta: Learn about Cadillac Lyriq drive unit longevity and maintenance

items.question: What's the difference between RWD and AWD Cadillac Lyriq drive units?
items.answer: RWD Lyriq uses a single 340hp rear motor (PMSM-RR), while AWD adds a front motor (PMSM-FR) for 500-528hp combined output - requiring different replacement parts and calibration procedures.
keyPoints: RWD replacement: single PMSM-RR unit, simpler installation, lower cost
AWD replacement: dual PMSM-FR/RR units, complex calibration, higher cost
Inverter modules differ between configurations - ensure correct part matching
AWD systems require inter-motor communication calibration after replacement
items.cta: Compare RWD versus AWD Cadillac Lyriq drive unit replacement prices

items.question: Are used Cadillac Lyriq drive units reliable for replacement?
items.answer: Used drive units from low-mileage accident-damaged Lyriq vehicles can be reliable if sourced from verified salvage suppliers with full testing documentation and warranty coverage.
keyPoints: Request pre-sale dyno test reports and mileage verification
Ensure unit includes inverter module and all mounting hardware
Verify compatibility with your specific model year and variant
Budget for potential calibration costs even with good-condition used units
items.cta: Check availability of tested used Cadillac Lyriq drive units

items.question: Does Cadillac Lyriq drive unit replacement require specialist EV technicians?
items.answer: Yes - high-voltage safety procedures, motor calibration and BMS communication require EV-certified technicians with Ultium platform experience - never attempt DIY drive unit replacement.
keyPoints: HV system isolation and discharge procedures mandatory for safety
Proprietary diagnostic tools required for motor calibration and fault clearing
Incorrect installation can void warranty and cause secondary damage
EngineMarket's network includes only EV-certified Lyriq specialists
items.cta: Find EV-certified Cadillac Lyriq drive unit fitting specialists near you

items.question: How quickly can I get a replacement Cadillac Lyriq drive unit?
items.answer: Rebuilt Cadillac Lyriq drive units typically ship within 3-5 working days from UK specialists, with supply & fit appointments available within 1-2 weeks depending on location and unit complexity.
keyPoints: In-stock rebuilt units available for common RWD configurations
AWD and high-output Sport units may require 5-7 day build time
Supply & fit scheduling depends on specialist workshop capacity in your area
Express service available for urgent cases at premium cost
items.cta: Get urgent quote for Cadillac Lyriq drive unit replacement with fast turnaround
